name: Do I need a lawyer for my work neck injury claim or can I handle it myself?
description: Not required but recommended for denials or complexity.

mainEntity.name: Do I need a lawyer for my work neck injury claim or can I handle it myself?

acceptedAnswer.text: Not required but recommended for denials or complexity.
acceptedAnswer.description: **You can file yourself, but a lawyer greatly improves outcomes for disputed neck claims.** Utah/Idaho systems favor represented claimants in appeals.[1][2] Key factors: Insurers deny 20-30% initially; complex causation proof; fee only from winnings. Avoid if simple; hire for denials, surgery needs. They handle paperwork, negotiations free upfront.
